name: Corn Meal Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F.
2. Grease 12 muffin cups and prepare them for baking.
3. In a medium-sized bowl, sift together the flour, baking powder, sugar, and salt. Add the cornmeal and stir until well combined.
4. In a small bowl, beat the eggs with a fork. Gradually add milk and vegetable oil to the egg mixture. Pour this liquid mixture into the dry ingredients and stir only until just moistened. The batter will be lumpy.
5. Using a tablespoon, fill each prepared muffin cup about halfway to two-thirds full with batter.
6. Bake for 15-20 minutes or until golden brown. Remove from oven and serve hot with butter, bacon, and eggs.
